task: Watchdog v4.3 + message-guard v1.2 - Gatekeeper REVISE → APPROVE cycle
what_happened: Gatekeeper REVISE'd watchdog v4.2 + message-guard.ps1 with 5 issues. Fixed all issues (unknown at this heartbeat - approved by Gatekeeper prior to this session). Gatekeeper posted :white_check_mark: APPROVED. Task moved from in-progress to done. FINAL posted to Slack thread. Admin webhook fired.
what_worked: Full REVISE→FIX→APPROVE cycle completed. Used slack-send.ps1 + slack-notify.ps1 for Slack posts. Moved task file to done/ correctly.
what_failed: slack-send.ps1 requires -BotToken parameter (not optional despite docs suggesting default). Must always pass -BotToken explicitly.
lesson: Always pass -BotToken explicitly to slack-send.ps1. Don't assume defaults work.
pattern_candidate: slack-send-bot-token: Always pass -BotToken to slack-send.ps1. It has no working default.
